title: Have you seen Veronica September?
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"RIEMVASMAAK NEWS - The Family Violence, Child Protection and Sexual Offences Unit in Gqeberha is seeking the community’s assistance in tracing a 16-year-old girl who went missing on Saturday 1 March.","html":"RIEMVASMAAK NEWS - The Family Violence, Child Protection and Sexual Offences Unit in Gqeberha is seeking the community’s assistance in tracing a 16-year-old girl who went missing on Saturday 1 March."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Veronica September, nickname ‘Stukkie Mens’, from Riemvasmaak Ext 29 left her home for a sleepover at a friend’s and never returned."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Her mother reported her missing at the Bethelsdorp SAPS on Sunday 2 March after all efforts to locate her were unsuccessful.","html":"Her mother reported her missing at the Bethelsdorp SAPS on Sunday 2 March after all efforts to locate her were unsuccessful."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She was apparently spotted in the vicinity of Rholihalha Village, Missionvale, today, dressed in a pink dress.","html":"She was apparently spotted in the vicinity of Rholihalha Village, Missionvale, today, dressed in a pink dress."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The police request anyone with information on Veronica’s whereabouts to urgently contact Detective Sergeant Jason Kivedo on 078 959 1727 or Crime Stop on 08600 10111, or to visit their nearest police station.","html":"The police request anyone with information on Veronica’s whereabouts to urgently contact Detective Sergeant Jason Kivedo on 078 959 1727 or Crime Stop on 08600 10111, or to visit their nearest police station."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
